title: Strict-Guard Gate Drift on Spec 031
summary: state-transition-guard.sh raised 38 BLOCK findings + 2 warnings against specs/031-live-stack-testing/ after the spec was promoted to done under an earlier gate set. Implementation on disk is real; drift is governance/evidence/provenance shaped. Bug routes remediation through the standard finding-owned planning + delivery chain.

findingCategories.description: Scenario-first TDD red->green markers missing in scope/report artifacts
Required specialist phases missing: regression, simplify, stabilize, security
Phase claim impersonation: chaos, docs, test, audit, validate listed in completedPhaseClaims but absent from executionHistory
Regression E2E planning items missing: 3 per scope (scenario DoD, suite DoD, Test Plan row) x 6 scopes
Change Boundary section, DoD item, and allowed/excluded surface enumeration missing in scopes.md (false-positive trigger on cleanup helper naming)
report.md missing ### Code Diff Evidence section
Scope 6 declares 60s configurable ML readiness timeout (SLA-sensitive) but has no stress test
full-delivery mode requires structured commit prefix spec(031) or bubbles(031/...); none in history
Warnings only: no completedAt timestamps; no concrete test file paths in some scope Test Plans

scopes.title: Planning Edits - Regression E2E Coverage Across 6 Scopes
Implementation - Scope 6 SLA Stress Test (+ scenario-first TDD)
Specialist Phase Re-Runs - G022 Provenance Closure (+ structured commit)

executionHistory.summary: Bug created by reconcile-to-doc (sweep-2026-05-23-r30 round 3) after state-transition-guard.sh rejected the prior spec-031 done promotion with 38 BLOCK findings + 2 warnings. Full 6-artifact planning packet authored: spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json. Parent spec state.json reset done->in_progress; BUG-031-006 registered in parent activeBugs. Routed to bubbles.design as next required owner.
